steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is behavioral economists (plural). The phrase “such as Gee, whose research focuses on charitable giving” provides examples but doesn't change the main subject's number.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
The rule of subject-verb agreement requires the verb to match the subject's number. Contend is the plural form that works.

The other three choices—has contended, contends, is contending—are all singular forms and violate the rule.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
